message:
Improve panic handling and reduce allocations in HTTP handling

dependency.rs - Safer cleanup execution:
- Add run_cleanup_future() helper for catching panics during future execution
- Previously only caught panics during cleanup function creation
- Now catches panics both when creating cleanup and when awaiting it
- Remaining cleanups continue even if earlier ones panic

extract.rs - Zero-allocation content-type check:
- Replace to_ascii_lowercase() with eq_ignore_ascii_case()
- Use get() slice checks instead of allocating lowercase string
- Check for application/json and *+json variants without heap allocation
- Reduces memory pressure in hot path

parser.rs - Zero-allocation chunked detection:
- Add contains_ignore_ascii_case() helper function
- Check Transfer-Encoding: chunked without allocating lowercase copy
- Uses byte-level comparison for performance

server.rs:
- Related minor import/cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
